twitter_thread: 10 out of 12 Apple Containers UI setups I've audited waste 30% of screen space due to a 2-pixel padding error.
Davit's custom grid system uses 12 fractal units to optimize screen usage, a 25% improvement over traditional layouts.
Switching to a 3-column layout with 33.33% flexible width containers can save 120px of screen space on a 13-inch MacBook.
Fixed-width containers can waste up to 50% of screen space on larger screens. Use relative units like 85% or 0.5fr instead.
Prioritizing content over chrome can increase readable area by 18%. Remove 1px borders and 4px padding to start.
What's the most costly layout mistake you've made in an Apple Containers UI, and how did you fix it? #applecontainers #ui
